name: UBS SDIC NewSilu Flexible Alloc Fd (LOF)
summary: UBS SDIC NewSilu Flexible Alloc Fd (LOF) is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF) that employs a flexible asset allocation strategy, potentially focusing on investments related to the "New Silk Road" initiative. The fund aims to achieve capital appreciation by dynamically adjusting its asset allocation based on market conditions and investment opportunities. It is managed by UBS SDIC Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
